info.name: Devadhwani API
info.description: Temple Management System API for managing temples, devotees, pooja bookings, inventory, and more.

request.description: Send OTP to phone via WhatsApp
Verify OTP and get auth token
Login with OTP and get auth token
Get panchang for a specific date
